basedOn: Full crawl of src/API/StyleApiController.cs (470 lines) and src/API/VisualizerApi.cs (1305 lines)

hostEntry.notes: MVC controllers registered via app.MapControllers(); static files via app.UseStaticFiles()

groups.name: template-management
groups.description: CRUD and generation for BWA-style Word templates (.dotx). Manages base templates, client-specific templates, and playground documents.

endpoints.purpose: Create template from JSON style definitions

groups.name: document-style-application
groups.description: Apply style templates to uploaded Word documents. Supports single-file, batch, and ad-hoc JSON-based style application.

endpoints.purpose: Apply client template styles to uploaded .docx
Apply ad-hoc JSON styles to uploaded .docx
Apply template to multiple .docx files, return ZIP

groups.name: analysis-pipeline
groups.description: Upload Word documents for AI-powered source decoding analysis. Supports first-time and iterative re-analysis with user feedback. Background job model with polling.

endpoints.purpose: Retrieve cached chunk data from ready folder

groups.name: export-pipeline
groups.description: Export edited chunks back to Word documents. Optionally applies client template skin. Persists chunks to ready folder for reload.

endpoints.purpose: Export chunks to .docx with optional template skin
List available export JSON files (ready folder)
Get last export data report block for a document

groups.name: style-group-library
groups.description: Full CRUD for style group presets (CSI, BWA, RPA built-ins + user-created). Persisted as JSON files in examples/stylegroups.

endpoints.purpose: Create a new custom style group
Update an existing custom style group

groups.name: per-document-styles
groups.description: Load and save style configuration for a specific analyzed document. Falls back to StyleConfiguration.CreateDefault() when no saved config exists.

endpoints.purpose: Save style config for a document
Extract CSS properties from a client template

groups.name: diagnostics
groups.description: Operational and diagnostic endpoints for the visualizer pipeline.

endpoints.purpose: Get runtime config (exports folder path, etc.)

staticAssets.notes: Single-page visualizer UI. Registered after API routes to avoid route conflicts.

architectureNotes: Two API registration styles coexist: MVC controller (StyleApiController) and Minimal API (VisualizerApi). Both are registered in CreateApiApp().
StyleApiController depends on StyleService (newed up directly, no DI). VisualizerApi inline-resolves its dependencies.
Analysis pipeline uses a background Task.Run with an in-memory ConcurrentDictionary job store — jobs do not survive process restart.
File I/O is heavy: exports, ready folder, stylegroups, templates, playgrounds all use project-root-relative paths with bin-folder fallback logic.
CORS is fully open (AllowAnyOrigin) — appropriate for local-only dev tool, but would need lockdown if exposed.

previousGroupMapping.style-template-api (9): Split into template-management (9) — now includes only template CRUD/generation
previousGroupMapping.other-api (12): Dissolved into template-management (partial), document-style-application (4), and per-document-styles (1)
previousGroupMapping.config-api (1): Moved to diagnostics (2) — grouped with discrepancy endpoint
previousGroupMapping.analysis-export-api (6): Split into analysis-pipeline (3) and export-pipeline (3) — these are distinct workflows
previousGroupMapping.visualizer-api (1): Moved to diagnostics (2) — the discrepancy endpoint is operational, not a user workflow
